content: Official MoonBit package documentation requires publishable metadata in moon.mod.json and README: SPDX license, keywords, repository, description, homepage, and README content displayed by mooncakes.io. It establishes SemVer but does not make changelog, support policy, incident recovery, or deprecation documentation registry requirements. MNF should retain these as project-level adoption and recovery contracts rather than misstate them as registry-mandated.
